root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire.balance, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day ,
( select sum( amount ) from sc_acc_m_expire_detail ,sc_acc_m_account_year where meterial_id = material_id and cal_expire_date <= ending_of_account and account_year = present_account_year - 4 ) as year_1 ,
( select amount from sc_acc_m_expire_detail ,sc_acc_m_account_year where meterial_id = material_id and cal_expire_date = ending_of_account and account_year = present_account_year - 3 ) as year_2 ,
( select amount from sc_acc_m_expire_detail ,sc_acc_m_account_year where meterial_id = material_id and cal_expire_date = ending_of_account and account_year = present_account_year - 2) as year_3 ,
( select amount from sc_acc_m_expire_detail ,sc_acc_m_account_year where meterial_id = material_id and cal_expire_date = ending_of_account and account_year = present_account_year - 1 ) as year_4 ,
( select amount from sc_acc_m_expire_detail ,sc_acc_m_account_year where meterial_id = material_id and cal_expire_date = ending_of_account and account_year = present_account_year ) as year_5 , present_account_year + 543 as present_account_tyear
FROM sc_acc_m_expire , sc_acc_m_account_constant WHERE sc_acc_m_expire.accu_method = '0' /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old ASC
